        SECTION
        		1
        1. Purpose and Scope
        TEXT
        This document defines derivative vector ingestion and query-time memory candidate retrieval for the current Memory Management subsystem.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-SRS-FILE-TREE Requirement File Tree Parent Anchor

        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIDENTIAL-LOG Confidential Retrieval Diagnostics

        • GHOST-MEM-IR-DETERMINISTIC-TESTS Deterministic Retrieval Testability
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-NO-DOC-A3 No Memory-to-Document A3 Claim

        • GHOST-MEM-IR-SIBLING-BOUNDARY Sibling Ownership Boundary
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT
        Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST shall derive traceable memory vector entries from durable MemoryRecords, persist them in a dedicated memory vector store, retrieve current-history semantic candidates, perform deterministic metadata lookups, score parent records and chunks, build a MemoryContextPack, and hand selected evidence to runtime compression and synthesis.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PRODUCT-NAME
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PRODUCT-NAME
        Product and Package Naming Boundary
        The product described by this document shall be named GHOST; current Python implementation paths may remain under ragstream.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-MEMORY-PARENT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-MEMORY-PARENT
        Memory Management Parent
        Memory Ingestion and Retrieval shall be governed by the authority model, capability boundaries, configuration governance, and sibling ownership defined in 50_memory_management.sdoc.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RECORDING-DEPENDENCY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RECORDING-DEPENDENCY
        Durable Recording Dependency
        Memory ingestion shall consume MemoryRecords owned by 51_memory_recording_and_files.sdoc and shall not replace their durable truth.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-MERGE-HANDOFF
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-MERGE-HANDOFF
        Compression and Synthesis Handoff
        Runtime episodic compression, ActiveBrief behavior, and final Memory Context synthesis shall be refined by 53_memory_merge_activebrief_blackboard.sdoc.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-BOUNDARY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-BOUNDARY
        Ingestion and Retrieval Boundary
        This document shall own memory vector-entry construction, memory vector persistence, ingestion orchestration, semantic vector search, deterministic index lookup, scoring, candidate selection, MemoryContextPack construction, and SuperPrompt memory-artifact write-back.

        It shall not own document retrieval, document A3/A4, durable MemoryRecord body changes, or final user-answer generation.
        SECTION
        		2
        2. Implementation Location Map and Startup Wiring
        TEXT
        The current implementation separates ingestion, retrieval support, orchestration, and session wiring.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PATH-CHUNKER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PATH-CHUNKER
        MemoryChunker Path
        Memory vector-entry construction shall be traceable to ragstream/memory/ingestion/memory_chunker.py.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PATH-INGEST-MANAGER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PATH-INGEST-MANAGER
        MemoryIngestionManager Path
        Memory ingestion orchestration shall be traceable to ragstream/memory/ingestion/memory_ingestion_manager.py.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PATH-STORE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PATH-STORE
        MemoryVectorStore Path
        Dedicated memory-vector persistence shall be traceable to ragstream/memory/ingestion/memory_vector_store.py.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PATH-RETRIEVER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PATH-RETRIEVER
        MemoryRetriever Path
        Memory retrieval orchestration shall be traceable to ragstream/retrieval/retriever_mem.py.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PATH-LOOKUP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PATH-LOOKUP
        MemoryIndexLookup Path
        Deterministic SQLite/.ragmem lookup shall be traceable to ragstream/memory/retrieval/memory_index_lookup.py.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PATH-SCORER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PATH-SCORER
        MemoryScorer Path
        Semantic hit normalization, parent aggregation, tag policy, recency, and semantic-chunk selection shall be traceable to ragstream/memory/retrieval/memory_scoring.py.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.7
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PATH-PACK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PATH-PACK
        MemoryContextPack Path
        The runtime memory candidate container shall be traceable to ragstream/memory/retrieval/memory_context_pack.py.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.8
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PATH-CONTROLLER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PATH-CONTROLLER
        Controller Wiring Path
        MemoryRetriever configuration and invocation shall be traceable to ragstream/app/controller.py and ragstream/app/ui_streamlit.py.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.9
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-DIR
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-DIR
        Current Memory Vector Directory
        Current startup shall persist memory vectors under data/memory/vector_db/.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.10
        GHOST-MEM-IR-COLLECTION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-COLLECTION
        Current Memory Collection
        Current startup shall use the Chroma collection name memory_vectors for memory vector entries.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.11
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EMBEDDER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EMBEDDER
        Current Memory Vector Embedding Model
        Current Streamlit startup shall initialize the memory vector store with OpenAI text-embedding-3-large.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.12
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEPARATE-STORE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEPARATE-STORE
        Document Store Separation
        The memory vector store shall remain physically and logically separate from project document Chroma stores and SPLADE stores.
        SECTION
        		3
        3. Memory Vector Entry Model
        TEXT
        MemoryChunker creates one discovery handle and zero or more question and answer blocks for each MemoryRecord.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ENTRY-ROLES
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ONE-HANDLE One Record Handle
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-QUESTION-BLOCKS Question Entries
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ANSWER-BLOCKS Answer Entries
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-EMPTY-ENTRY-FILTER Empty Entry Filter
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ID-FORMAT Vector Entry Identifier
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ENTRY-METADATA Vector Entry Metadata Contract
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-ENTRIES AC: Vector Entry Roles
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ENTRY-ROLES
        Vector Entry Roles
        MemoryChunker shall produce vector entries with role record_handle, question, or answer.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ONE-HANDLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ENTRY-ROLES Vector Entry Roles
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-HANDLE-PROJECT Record Handle Project Text
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-HANDLE-YAKE Record Handle Automatic Keywords
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-HANDLE-QUESTION Record Handle Question Anchor
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-HANDLE-NO-TAG-TEXT Current Handle Text Exclusions
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ONE-HANDLE
        One Record Handle
        Each record ingestion shall attempt to create one record_handle entry with block_id 0000 and position zero.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-QUESTION-BLOCKS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ENTRY-ROLES Vector Entry Roles
        GHOST-MEM-IR-QUESTION-BLOCKS
        Question Entries
        MemoryChunker shall create ordered question entries from input_text, beginning with block_id 0001 and position one.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ANSWER-BLOCKS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ENTRY-ROLES Vector Entry Roles
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ANSWER-BLOCKS
        Answer Entries
        MemoryChunker shall create ordered answer entries from output_text, beginning with block_id 0001 and position one.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EMPTY-ENTRY-FILTER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ENTRY-ROLES Vector Entry Roles
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EMPTY-ENTRY-FILTER
        Empty Entry Filter
        A generated vector entry whose document text is empty after trimming shall be omitted from the returned entry list.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ID-FORMAT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ENTRY-ROLES Vector Entry Roles
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ID-TRACEABILITY Vector Parent Traceability
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ID-FORMAT
        Vector Entry Identifier
        The current vector identifier shall follow mem::<file_id>::<record_id>::<role>::<block_id>.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.7
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ID-TRACEABILITY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ID-FORMAT Vector Entry Identifier
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ID-TRACEABILITY
        Vector Parent Traceability
        Every vector entry identifier and metadata shall link to file_id and record_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.8
        GHOST-MEM-IR-HANDLE-PROJECT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ONE-HANDLE One Record Handle
        GHOST-MEM-IR-HANDLE-PROJECT
        Record Handle Project Text
        The current record-handle embedded text shall include PROJECT derived from active_project_name.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.9
        GHOST-MEM-IR-HANDLE-YAKE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ONE-HANDLE One Record Handle
        GHOST-MEM-IR-HANDLE-YAKE
        Record Handle Automatic Keywords
        The current record-handle embedded text shall include YAKE_KEYWORDS derived from automatic keywords.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.10
        GHOST-MEM-IR-HANDLE-QUESTION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ONE-HANDLE One Record Handle
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-QUESTION-ANCHOR-TRUNCATE Question Anchor Truncation
        GHOST-MEM-IR-HANDLE-QUESTION
        Record Handle Question Anchor
        The current record-handle embedded text shall include a QUESTION_ANCHOR derived from the first question block and bounded by question_anchor_tokens.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.11
        GHOST-MEM-IR-HANDLE-NO-TAG-TEXT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ONE-HANDLE One Record Handle
        GHOST-MEM-IR-HANDLE-NO-TAG-TEXT
        Current Handle Text Exclusions
        The current record-handle embedded text shall not include tag or user_keywords, although those values may remain present in vector metadata.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.12
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ENTRY-METADATA
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ENTRY-ROLES Vector Entry Roles
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-METADATA-SNAPSHOT Vector Metadata Snapshot
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ENTRY-METADATA
        Vector Entry Metadata Contract
        Each vector entry shall carry current file and record identifiers, paired filenames, parent_id, role, block identity and position, character offsets, approximate token count, tag, project, source, creation time, hashes, keyword text, embedded-file snapshot text, chunking configuration version, and ingestion hash.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.13
        GHOST-MEM-IR-METADATA-SNAPSHOT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ENTRY-METADATA Vector Entry Metadata Contract
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-LIVE-METADATA-OVERLAY Live Metadata during Retrieval
        GHOST-MEM-IR-METADATA-SNAPSHOT
        Vector Metadata Snapshot
        Vector metadata shall represent values at ingestion time and shall remain derivative rather than current metadata authority.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.14
        GHOST-MEM-IR-LIVE-METADATA-OVERLAY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-METADATA-SNAPSHOT Vector Metadata Snapshot
        GHOST-MEM-IR-LIVE-METADATA-OVERLAY
        Live Metadata during Retrieval
        When live MemoryRecords are available, retrieval scoring and candidate enrichment shall overlay live record metadata onto vector-derived metadata.
        SECTION
        		4
        4. Memory Chunking and Ingestion Hash
        TEXT
        The current chunker uses approximate whitespace-token counts and paragraph/sentence-aware grouping rather than a provider tokenizer.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CHUNKER-CONFIG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-TOKEN-APPROX Approximate Token Counting
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PARAGRAPH-UNITS Paragraph Unit Selection
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-SENTENCE-UNITS Oversized Paragraph Sentence Units
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-HARD-SPLIT Oversized Unit Hard Split
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-BLOCK-TARGET Target Block Completion
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-BLOCK-OFFSETS Block Offsets
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CHUNK-CONFIG-JSON-DIRECTION Chunker JSON Migration Direction
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CHUNKER-CONFIG
        Current Chunker Configuration
        MemoryChunker shall maintain current defaults config_version memory_chunker_001, target_tokens 500, max_tokens 800, and question_anchor_tokens 220, with optional constructor overrides.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-TOKEN-APPROX
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CHUNKER-CONFIG Current Chunker Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-TOKEN-APPROX
        Approximate Token Counting
        Current MemoryChunker token counts shall be the number of non-whitespace word matches and shall not be described as exact provider-token counts.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PARAGRAPH-UNITS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CHUNKER-CONFIG Current Chunker Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PARAGRAPH-UNITS
        Paragraph Unit Selection
        Paragraphs not exceeding max_tokens shall be used as semantic units.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SENTENCE-UNITS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CHUNKER-CONFIG Current Chunker Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SENTENCE-UNITS
        Oversized Paragraph Sentence Units
        An oversized paragraph shall be split into current sentence-like units based on punctuation or line endings.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-HARD-SPLIT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CHUNKER-CONFIG Current Chunker Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-HARD-SPLIT
        Oversized Unit Hard Split
        A semantic unit exceeding max_tokens shall be hard-split by non-whitespace word groups of at most max_tokens approximate tokens.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-BLOCK-TARGET
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CHUNKER-CONFIG Current Chunker Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-BLOCK-TARGET
        Target Block Completion
        Current units shall accumulate until target_tokens is reached or the next unit would exceed max_tokens.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.7
        GHOST-MEM-IR-BLOCK-OFFSETS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CHUNKER-CONFIG Current Chunker Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-BLOCK-OFFSETS
        Block Offsets
        Every question or answer block shall retain start_offset and end_offset relative to its source side.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.8
        GHOST-MEM-IR-QUESTION-ANCHOR-TRUNCATE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-HANDLE-QUESTION Record Handle Question Anchor
        GHOST-MEM-IR-QUESTION-ANCHOR-TRUNCATE
        Question Anchor Truncation
        Question-anchor truncation shall retain the first configured number of whitespace-delimited words.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.9
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGESTION-HASH
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-INGESTION-HASH-NOT-TRUTH Ingestion Hash Status
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGESTION-HASH
        Ingestion Hash
        MemoryChunker shall compute SHA-256 over a deterministic JSON payload describing file_id, record_id, input/output hashes, tag, automatic/user keywords, active project, and chunking configuration version.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.10
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGESTION-HASH-NOT-TRUTH
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-INGESTION-HASH Ingestion Hash
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGESTION-HASH-NOT-TRUTH
        Ingestion Hash Status
        The ingestion hash shall identify the derivative ingestion representation and shall not replace input_hash, output_hash, record_id, or file_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.11
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CHUNK-CONFIG-JSON-DIRECTION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CHUNKER-CONFIG Current Chunker Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CHUNK-CONFIG-JSON-DIRECTION
        Chunker JSON Migration Direction
        Memory chunk sizes, anchor limit, and chunker version are operational tuning values and shall migrate to validated versioned JSON configuration before being claimed as centrally configured.
        SECTION
        		5
        5. Dedicated Memory Vector Store
        TEXT
        MemoryVectorStore owns persistent memory embeddings and record/file-level vector replacement or deletion.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-PERSISTENT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-NO-TRUTH Vector Store Non-Authority
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-REPLACE-ID Record Replacement Identifier Validation
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-REPLACE-DELETE-FIRST Current Record Replacement Order
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-REPLACE-EMPTY Empty Replacement Entry Set
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-DOCUMENTS Embedded Documents
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-METADATA-SANITIZE Metadata Sanitization
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-EMBED Document Embedding
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-ADD Vector Add Contract
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-REPLACE-REPORT Replacement Report
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-QUERY-EMPTY Empty Store Query
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-QUERY Store Query Contract
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-DELETE-RECORD Delete Record Vectors
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-DELETE-FILE Delete History Vectors
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-COUNT-SAFE Vector Count Failure Behavior
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-PERSISTENT
        Persistent Chroma Store
        MemoryVectorStore shall create its persistence directory and open or create one named Chroma collection.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-NO-TRUTH
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-PERSISTENT Persistent Chroma Store
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-NO-TRUTH
        Vector Store Non-Authority
        MemoryVectorStore shall not own MemoryRecord truth, SQLite metadata authority, memory scoring, or MemoryContextPack construction.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-REPLACE-ID
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-PERSISTENT Persistent Chroma Store
        GHOST-MEM-IR-REPLACE-ID
        Record Replacement Identifier Validation
        replace_record_entries shall reject an empty record_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-REPLACE-DELETE-FIRST
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-PERSISTENT Persistent Chroma Store
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-REPLACEMENT-ATOMICITY Current Replacement Transaction Boundary
        GHOST-MEM-IR-REPLACE-DELETE-FIRST
        Current Record Replacement Order
        Current record replacement shall count and delete all existing vectors for record_id before embedding and adding the new entry set.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-REPLACE-EMPTY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-PERSISTENT Persistent Chroma Store
        GHOST-MEM-IR-REPLACE-EMPTY
        Empty Replacement Entry Set
        When replacement receives no entries, it shall leave the record with zero vectors and return a successful zero-write report after deleting prior vectors.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-DOCUMENTS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-PERSISTENT Persistent Chroma Store
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-DOCUMENTS
        Embedded Documents
        The memory vector collection shall persist the vector entry document text together with embeddings and sanitized metadata.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.7
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-METADATA-SANITIZE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-PERSISTENT Persistent Chroma Store
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-METADATA-SANITIZE
        Metadata Sanitization
        Vector metadata shall be converted to Chroma-compatible scalar values; non-scalar values shall be JSON-serialized and None shall become an empty string.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.8
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-EMBED
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-PERSISTENT Persistent Chroma Store
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-EMBED
        Document Embedding
        MemoryVectorStore shall obtain one embedding per vector-entry document through its configured embedder and normalize returned vectors to lists of floats.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.9
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-ADD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-PERSISTENT Persistent Chroma Store
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-ADD
        Vector Add Contract
        After prior record vectors are deleted, current replacement shall add aligned IDs, documents, embeddings, and metadata to the collection.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.10
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-REPLACE-REPORT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-PERSISTENT Persistent Chroma Store
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-REPLACE-REPORT
        Replacement Report
        Record replacement shall report success, record_id, deleted prior vector count, vectors written, resulting record vector count, collection name, and persistence directory.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.11
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-QUERY-EMPTY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-PERSISTENT Persistent Chroma Store
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-QUERY-EMPTY
        Empty Store Query
        MemoryVectorStore.query shall return an empty hit list when query_text is empty after trimming.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.12
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-QUERY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-PERSISTENT Persistent Chroma Store
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-QUERY
        Store Query Contract
        MemoryVectorStore.query shall embed query_text, query the collection with optional sanitized flat metadata filter, and return ordered flat hits containing id, document, metadata, distance, and one-based rank.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.13
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-DELETE-RECORD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-PERSISTENT Persistent Chroma Store
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-DELETE-RECORD
        Delete Record Vectors
        MemoryVectorStore.delete_record shall delete vectors by record_id and report deleted and remaining counts.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.14
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-DELETE-FILE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-PERSISTENT Persistent Chroma Store
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-DELETE-FILE
        Delete History Vectors
        MemoryVectorStore.delete_file shall delete vectors by file_id and report deleted and remaining file-level counts.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.15
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-COUNT-SAFE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-PERSISTENT Persistent Chroma Store
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-COUNT-SAFE
        Vector Count Failure Behavior
        Current count_record and count_file helpers shall return zero when collection counting raises an exception.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.16
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-REPLACEMENT-ATOMICITY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-REPLACE-DELETE-FIRST Current Record Replacement Order
        GHOST-MEM-IR-STORE-REPLACEMENT-ATOMICITY
        Current Replacement Transaction Boundary
        Current delete-then-add replacement shall not be described as one atomic storage transaction; durable MemoryRecord truth shall provide failure isolation when vector replacement is interrupted.
        SECTION
        		6
        6. Memory Ingestion Orchestration
        TEXT
        MemoryIngestionManager coordinates record lookup, vector-entry construction, replacement, reporting, bulk ingestion, and optional daemon-thread scheduling.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-DEPS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-DEPS
        Ingestion Dependencies
        MemoryIngestionManager shall receive the active MemoryManager, MemoryChunker, and MemoryVectorStore.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-ID
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-ID
        Ingest Record Identifier Validation
        ingest_record shall return an unsuccessful result when record_id is empty.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-LOOKUP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-LOOKUP
        Live Record Lookup
        ingest_record shall resolve record_id from the active MemoryManager.records list and shall report unsuccessful status when not found.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-BUILD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-BUILD
        Vector Entry Construction
        For a found record, ingestion shall call MemoryChunker.build_vector_entries with current file_id and paired filenames.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-ROLE-COUNTS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-ROLE-COUNTS
        Ingestion Role Counts
        Ingestion shall count returned entries by metadata role for diagnostics and result reporting.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-REPLACE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-IDEMPOTENT-REPRESENTATION Record-Level Re-Ingestion Idempotency
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-REPLACE
        Record Vector Replacement
        Ingestion shall replace all vectors for the record_id using the newly generated entry set.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.7
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-RESULT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-RESULT
        Ingestion Result Enrichment
        The ingestion result shall include role counts, current file_id, and active .ragmem filename in addition to store replacement data.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.8
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-EXCEPTION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-EXCEPTION
        Ingestion Exception Handling
        An exception during vector-entry construction or store replacement shall return an unsuccessful record-level result and shall not modify durable MemoryRecord files.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.9
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-ALL
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-ALL-STATUS Bulk Ingestion Success Status
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-ALL
        Loaded History Bulk Ingestion
        ingest_all shall iterate the current active MemoryManager record list in order, invoke ingest_record for each record, and report total, success, failure, and individual results.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.10
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-ALL-STATUS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-ALL Loaded History Bulk Ingestion
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-ALL-STATUS
        Bulk Ingestion Success Status
        The bulk ingestion success field shall be true only when failure_count is zero.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.11
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-SCHEDULE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-DUPLICATE Duplicate Async Suppression
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-CLEANUP Async Active-Set Cleanup
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-STREAMLIT-CONTEXT Optional Streamlit Thread Context
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-NO-DURABLE-QUEUE No Durable Ingestion Queue Claim
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-SCHEDULE
        Asynchronous Record Ingestion
        ingest_record_async shall schedule one daemon thread for a valid active record_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.12
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-DUPLICATE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-SCHEDULE Asynchronous Record Ingestion
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-DUPLICATE
        Duplicate Async Suppression
        A process-local lock and active-record identifier set shall prevent concurrent duplicate scheduling for the same record_id within one MemoryIngestionManager instance.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.13
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-CLEANUP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-SCHEDULE Asynchronous Record Ingestion
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-CLEANUP
        Async Active-Set Cleanup
        The asynchronous worker shall remove record_id from the active set in a finally block.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.14
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-STREAMLIT-CONTEXT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-SCHEDULE Asynchronous Record Ingestion
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-STREAMLIT-CONTEXT
        Optional Streamlit Thread Context
        When available, current scheduling shall attach the active Streamlit script context to the ingestion thread; absence of that support shall not block thread start.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.15
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-NO-DURABLE-QUEUE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-SCHEDULE Asynchronous Record Ingestion
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ASYNC-NO-DURABLE-QUEUE
        No Durable Ingestion Queue Claim
        The current daemon-thread scheduler shall not be described as a durable queue, retry service, or cross-process ingestion coordinator.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.16
        GHOST-MEM-IR-IDEMPOTENT-REPRESENTATION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-REPLACE Record Vector Replacement
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-IDEMPOTENT AC: Record Re-Ingestion
        GHOST-MEM-IR-IDEMPOTENT-REPRESENTATION
        Record-Level Re-Ingestion Idempotency
        Re-ingesting a record shall replace its prior record_id vectors rather than intentionally append duplicate representations.
        SECTION
        		7
        7. Memory Retrieval Input and Routing Preconditions
        TEXT
        MemoryRetriever receives the active SuperPrompt, current MemoryManager, dedicated vector store, SQLite path, and runtime configuration.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RETRIEVER-DEPS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-SHAPE Full or Section Configuration Input
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ENABLED Memory Retrieval Enable Switch
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-MEMORY-PERMISSION PreProcessing Memory Permission
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-MISSING-FILE-ID Missing Active file_id
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-PRIMARY Primary Memory Query
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-EMPTY-QUERY Empty Query Result
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-KEY-INPUT Direct Recall Key Input
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-LATEST-BRIEF Latest Eligible ActiveBrief Snapshot
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RETRIEVER-DEPS
        MemoryRetriever Dependencies
        MemoryRetriever shall construct MemoryIndexLookup, MemoryScorer, MemoryCompressor, and MemoryMergeSynthesizer from its supplied dependencies and configuration.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-SHAPE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-RETRIEVER-DEPS MemoryRetriever Dependencies
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-SHAPE
        Full or Section Configuration Input
        MemoryRetriever shall accept either the full runtime configuration containing memory_retrieval or the memory_retrieval section itself.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ENABLED
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-RETRIEVER-DEPS MemoryRetriever Dependencies
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ENABLED
        Memory Retrieval Enable Switch
        When memory_retrieval.enabled is false, MemoryRetriever.run shall skip its processing and return the SuperPrompt unchanged.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-MEMORY-PERMISSION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-RETRIEVER-DEPS MemoryRetriever Dependencies
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-PERMISSION AC: Memory Context Permission
        GHOST-MEM-IR-MEMORY-PERMISSION
        PreProcessing Memory Permission
        Memory retrieval and Memory Context synthesis shall honor the deterministic allow_memory_context and memory_context_policy prepared by PreProcessing.

        A disabled memory-context policy shall suppress memory context creation rather than allow unrelated memory to enter the final prompt.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-MISSING-FILE-ID
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-RETRIEVER-DEPS MemoryRetriever Dependencies
        GHOST-MEM-IR-MISSING-FILE-ID
        Missing Active file_id
        When active file_id is empty, MemoryRetriever shall write an empty MemoryContextPack with reason no_active_memory_file.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-PRIMARY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-RETRIEVER-DEPS MemoryRetriever Dependencies
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-PROJECTOR Projected Query Fallback
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-BODY-FALLBACK Body Query Fallback
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-PROMPT-FALLBACK Prompt-Ready Final Fallback
        GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-PRIMARY
        Primary Memory Query
        MemoryRetriever shall use non-empty SuperPrompt.effective_retrieval_query_text as its primary query source.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.7
        GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-PROJECTOR
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-PRIMARY Primary Memory Query
        GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-PROJECTOR
        Projected Query Fallback
        When the effective query is empty, MemoryRetriever shall attempt SuperPromptProjector.build_query_text.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.8
        GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-BODY-FALLBACK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-PRIMARY Primary Memory Query
        GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-BODY-FALLBACK
        Body Query Fallback
        If projector query construction fails, current fallback shall concatenate non-empty task, purpose, context, and text body fields in that order.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.9
        GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-PROMPT-FALLBACK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-PRIMARY Primary Memory Query
        GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-PROMPT-FALLBACK
        Prompt-Ready Final Fallback
        If no fallback body fields are available, current query construction may use non-empty prompt_ready.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.10
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EMPTY-QUERY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-RETRIEVER-DEPS MemoryRetriever Dependencies
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EMPTY-QUERY
        Empty Query Result
        When no query text can be built, MemoryRetriever shall write an empty pack with reason empty_query_text.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.11
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-KEY-INPUT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-RETRIEVER-DEPS MemoryRetriever Dependencies
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-KEY-NO-UI Current Direct Recall Query UI Boundary
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-KEY-INPUT
        Direct Recall Key Input
        Current MemoryRetriever shall inspect SuperPrompt extras and body for direct_recall_key or memory_direct_recall_key and shall use the first non-empty trimmed value.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.12
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-KEY-NO-UI
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-KEY-INPUT Direct Recall Key Input
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-KEY-NO-UI
        Current Direct Recall Query UI Boundary
        The current GUI does not require a separate Direct Recall query field; an absent key shall produce no Direct Recall lookup.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.13
        GHOST-MEM-IR-LATEST-BRIEF
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-RETRIEVER-DEPS MemoryRetriever Dependencies
        GHOST-MEM-IR-LATEST-BRIEF
        Latest Eligible ActiveBrief Snapshot
        MemoryRetriever shall scan active records newest-to-oldest and select the latest non-Black record with a non-empty ActiveRetrievalBrief as the runtime brief snapshot.
        SECTION
        		8
        8. Semantic Memory Vector Pass
        TEXT
        The semantic pass uses one active-history query to produce raw vector hits, parent-record scores, semantic chunks, and episodic candidates.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-ENABLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-ENABLE
        Semantic Memory Enable Switch
        When semantic_memory_chunks.enabled is false, the semantic pass shall return empty raw hits, scored hits, parent scores, semantic chunks, and semantic episodic candidates.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-MAX
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-MAX
        Semantic Chunk Limit
        The final semantic memory chunk list shall be capped by semantic_memory_chunks.max_memory_chunks whose current JSON baseline is 5.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RAW-HIT-LIMIT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-RAW-HIT-CONFIG-DIRECTION Raw Hit Expansion Configuration Direction
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RAW-HIT-LIMIT
        Current Raw Hit Expansion
        The current raw vector hit request shall use max(max_memory_chunks multiplied by 6, 20) to provide additional evidence for parent aggregation.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RAW-HIT-CONFIG-DIRECTION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-RAW-HIT-LIMIT Current Raw Hit Expansion
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RAW-HIT-CONFIG-DIRECTION
        Raw Hit Expansion Configuration Direction
        The raw-hit expansion multiplier and minimum are tuning parameters and shall migrate to validated versioned JSON before being claimed as centrally configured.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-FILE-FILTER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-FILTER-FAILURE Filtered Query Failure Integrity
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-FILE-FILTER
        Automatic Semantic History Scope
        Automatic semantic memory retrieval shall be restricted to the active file_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-FILTER-FAILURE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-FILE-FILTER Automatic Semantic History Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-SCOPE AC: Automatic History Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-FILTER-FAILURE
        Filtered Query Failure Integrity
        Failure of the active-file metadata filter shall not authorize automatic unfiltered retrieval across all histories.

        Cross-history semantic fallback shall be treated as non-conforming unless separately approved.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.7
        GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-EMBED
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-QUERY-EMBED
        Memory Query Embedding
        The memory query shall be embedded once through the memory vector store embedder for the raw semantic query.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.8
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RAW-HIT-SHAPE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RAW-HIT-SHAPE
        Raw Hit Shape
        Normalized raw vector hits shall contain id, document, metadata, distance, and one-based rank.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.9
        GHOST-MEM-IR-LIVE-EPISODE-METADATA
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-K-NOT-CLOCK Episode Distance Not Clock Time
        GHOST-MEM-IR-LIVE-EPISODE-METADATA
        Episode Distance Metadata
        Live MemoryRecords shall be assigned episode_index and episode_distance_k where the latest record has k zero and each older record increments k by one.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.10
        GHOST-MEM-IR-K-NOT-CLOCK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-LIVE-EPISODE-METADATA Episode Distance Metadata
        GHOST-MEM-IR-K-NOT-CLOCK
        Episode Distance Not Clock Time
        Current recency shall be based on record distance k in the active history rather than elapsed wall-clock time.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.11
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-PARENT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-PARENT
        Semantic Parent Candidate Conversion
        Ranked parent scores shall be converted into episodic candidates with live Q/A body when available and SQLite/.ragmem fallback when not available in RAM.
        SECTION
        		9
        9. Raw Hit Normalization and Parent Aggregation
        TEXT
        MemoryScorer separates question, answer, and record-handle evidence before applying retrieval-source and recency policy.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DISTANCE-SCORE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-DISTANCE-INVALID Invalid Distance Handling
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DISTANCE-SCORE
        Distance-to-Score Conversion
        When a raw hit has no explicit score, current scoring shall convert Chroma distance d to 1 divided by 1 plus d after clamping negative d to zero.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DISTANCE-INVALID
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-DISTANCE-SCORE Distance-to-Score Conversion
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DISTANCE-INVALID
        Invalid Distance Handling
        Missing, non-numeric, NaN, or infinite distance shall produce score zero.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SCORED-HIT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SCORED-HIT
        Scored Hit Contract
        Each scored hit shall preserve rank, vector_id, record_id, role, score, semantic_score, distance, document, metadata, and raw hit.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-GROUP-BY-RECORD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROLE-MAX Current Per-Role Aggregation
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PARENT-DIAGNOSTICS Parent Hit Diagnostics
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-SOURCE-MODE-QA QA Parent Weighting
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-SOURCE-MODE-A A Parent Weighting
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-SOURCE-MODE-Q Q Parent Weighting
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-SOURCE-MODE-FALLBACK Invalid Source Mode Fallback
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-PARENT-SCORE Semantic Parent Score
        GHOST-MEM-IR-GROUP-BY-RECORD
        Parent Grouping
        Parent aggregation shall group scored hits by non-empty record_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ROLE-MAX
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-GROUP-BY-RECORD Parent Grouping
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-NO-PNORM-PARENT No Current Parent p-Norm Claim
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-PARENT-SCORE AC: Parent Role Scoring
        GHOST-MEM-IR-ROLE-MAX
        Current Per-Role Aggregation
        For each parent MemoryRecord, current aggregation shall use the maximum question hit score, maximum answer hit score, and maximum other-role meta score.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-NO-PNORM-PARENT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROLE-MAX Current Per-Role Aggregation
        GHOST-MEM-IR-NO-PNORM-PARENT
        No Current Parent p-Norm Claim
        The current parent aggregation shall not be described as p-norm averaging across multiple hits within a role.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.7
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PARENT-DIAGNOSTICS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-GROUP-BY-RECORD Parent Grouping
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PARENT-DIAGNOSTICS
        Parent Hit Diagnostics
        Each parent score record shall retain hit_count and the contributing hit list for diagnostics.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.8
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SOURCE-MODE-QA
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-GROUP-BY-RECORD Parent Grouping
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SOURCE-MODE-QA
        QA Parent Weighting
        For retrieval_source_mode QA, current configured parent scoring shall apply answer, question, and meta weights from runtime_config; the current baseline is 0.55, 0.35, and 0.10.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.9
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SOURCE-MODE-A
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-GROUP-BY-RECORD Parent Grouping
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SOURCE-MODE-A
        A Parent Weighting
        For retrieval_source_mode A, current baseline parent weights shall be answer 0.85, question 0.0, and meta 0.15.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.10
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SOURCE-MODE-Q
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-GROUP-BY-RECORD Parent Grouping
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SOURCE-MODE-Q
        Q Parent Weighting
        For retrieval_source_mode Q, current baseline parent weights shall be answer 0.0, question 0.85, and meta 0.15.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.11
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SOURCE-MODE-FALLBACK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-GROUP-BY-RECORD Parent Grouping
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SOURCE-MODE-FALLBACK
        Invalid Source Mode Fallback
        An invalid parent retrieval_source_mode shall be normalized to QA for scoring.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.12
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-PARENT-SCORE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-GROUP-BY-RECORD Parent Grouping
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-PARENT-SCORE
        Semantic Parent Score
        semantic_parent_score shall be the weighted sum of answer_score, question_score, and meta_score under the applied source-mode weights.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.13
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EXCLUDED-TAGS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EXCLUDED-TAGS
        Automatic Retrieval Excluded Tags
        Parent and semantic-chunk automatic selection shall exclude tags collected from configured memory retrieval exclude_tags; current configuration excludes Black.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.14
        GHOST-MEM-IR-GOLD-FLAG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-GOLD-FLAG
        Gold Recency Bypass Flag
        A non-excluded Gold parent shall be marked as bypassing normal recency scoring.
        SECTION
        		10
        10. Episodic Recency and Semantic Chunk Selection
        TEXT
        Current recency adds a bounded episode-distance signal for Green candidates while Gold bypasses normal decay.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-RECENCY-ENABLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-RECENCY-ENABLE
        Episodic Recency Enable Switch
        When episodic_memory.recency_enabled is false, final parent score shall equal semantic_parent_score for non-Gold candidates.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-WEIGHTS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-WEIGHTS
        Current Episodic Semantic and Recency Weights
        Current Green episodic scoring shall use configured semantic and recency weights whose baselines are 0.75 and 0.25.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-WEIGHT-NORMALIZATION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-WEIGHT-NORMALIZATION
        Two-Weight Normalization
        Semantic and recency weights shall be clamped non-negative and normalized to sum one; when their total is non-positive, the effective weights shall become 1.0 semantic and 0.0 recency.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RECENCY-HALF-LIFE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-RECENCY AC: Episode Recency
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RECENCY-HALF-LIFE
        Episode-Distance Half-Life
        Current recency score shall use 2 raised to negative k divided by half_life_k; the current episodic baseline half-life is 10 records.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RECENCY-MISSING
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RECENCY-MISSING
        Missing Episode Distance
        Missing, invalid, NaN, or infinite episode distance shall produce recency score 1.0 so otherwise relevant memory is not discarded solely by absent metadata.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RECENCY-NEGATIVE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RECENCY-NEGATIVE
        Negative Episode Distance
        Negative episode distance shall be treated as zero.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.7
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RECENCY-HALF-LIFE-FALLBACK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RECENCY-HALF-LIFE-FALLBACK
        Invalid Half-Life Fallback
        Invalid, non-positive, NaN, or infinite half-life shall use the current fallback 10.0.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.8
        GHOST-MEM-IR-GOLD-RECENCY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-GOLD-RECENCY
        Gold Parent Recency Bypass
        Gold parent final score shall equal semantic_parent_score and shall carry no recency score in the current scoring path.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.9
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PARENT-RANK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PARENT-RANK
        Parent Deterministic Ranking
        Parent candidates shall be sorted by final_parent_score descending.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.10
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-ROLES
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-SEMANTIC AC: Semantic Chunk Roles
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-ROLES
        Semantic Chunk Evidence Roles
        Final semantic memory chunks shall be selected only from question and answer hits; record_handle hits shall remain discovery evidence and shall not be returned as semantic evidence chunks.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.11
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-WEIGHTS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-WEIGHTS
        Current Semantic Chunk Weights
        Current non-Gold semantic chunk scoring shall use configured semantic and recency weights whose baselines are 0.90 and 0.10.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.12
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-HALF-LIFE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-HALF-LIFE
        Semantic Chunk Half-Life
        Current semantic chunk recency shall use configured half_life_k whose baseline is 10 records.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.13
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-GOLD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-GOLD
        Gold Semantic Chunk Recency Bypass
        A Gold semantic chunk shall use semantic_score directly without recency contribution.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.14
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-SORT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-SORT
        Semantic Chunk Ranking
        Semantic chunk candidates shall be sorted by final score descending and truncated to max_memory_chunks.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.15
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-TRACE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-TRACE
        Semantic Chunk Trace Fields
        Selected semantic chunks shall preserve vector_id, record_id, role, final and semantic scores, recency data, distance, document text, merged metadata, and raw rank.
        SECTION
        		11
        11. Deterministic SQLite and .ragmem Candidate Lookups
        TEXT
        MemoryIndexLookup selects recent, Gold, and exact-key candidates from metadata and attaches full Q/A body from .ragmem.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-LOOKUP-NO-SQLITE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-LOOKUP-NO-SQLITE
        Missing SQLite Behavior
        When memory_index.sqlite3 does not exist, deterministic lookup shall return no rows and log the missing-index condition.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-WORKING-ENABLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-WORKING-ENABLE
        Working Memory Enable Switch
        When working_memory.enabled is false, working-memory lookup shall return an empty list.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-WORKING-CURRENT-FILE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-WORKING-CURRENT-FILE
        Working Memory History Scope
        Working-memory lookup shall be restricted to the active file_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-WORKING-LATEST
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-WORKING AC: Working Memory
        GHOST-MEM-IR-WORKING-LATEST
        Working Memory Ordering and Limit
        Working-memory lookup shall select latest non-excluded records ordered by created_at_utc descending and limited by max_pairs; the current baseline is 2.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-GOLD-ENABLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-GOLD-ENABLE
        Gold Lookup Enable Dependency
        When episodic_memory.enabled is false, current Gold lookup shall return an empty list.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-GOLD-CURRENT-FILE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-GOLD-CURRENT-FILE
        Gold History Scope
        Gold lookup shall be restricted to the active file_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.7
        GHOST-MEM-IR-GOLD-LATEST
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-GOLD-LATEST
        Gold Ordering and Limit
        Gold lookup shall select latest Gold records ordered by created_at_utc descending and limited by max_gold_records; the current baseline is 1.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.8
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-ENABLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-ENABLE
        Direct Recall Enable Switch
        When direct_recall.enabled is false or the key is empty, Direct Recall lookup shall return no candidate.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.9
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-EXACT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-CROSS-FILE Direct Recall Cross-History Scope
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-EXCLUDE Direct Recall Tag Exclusion
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-PRIORITY Direct Recall Result Priority
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-ONE One Direct Recall Candidate
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-EXACT
        Exact Direct Recall Match
        Direct Recall shall match direct_recall_key by exact SQLite equality rather than semantic similarity.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.10
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-CROSS-FILE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-EXACT Exact Direct Recall Match
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-CROSS-FILE
        Direct Recall Cross-History Scope
        Direct Recall may search all indexed memory histories and is the current explicit cross-history retrieval path.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.11
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-EXCLUDE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-EXACT Exact Direct Recall Match
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-EXCLUDE
        Direct Recall Tag Exclusion
        Direct Recall shall exclude configured tags; the current baseline excludes Black.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.12
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-PRIORITY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-EXACT Exact Direct Recall Match
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-DIRECT AC: Exact Direct Recall
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-PRIORITY
        Direct Recall Result Priority
        When multiple exact matches exist, current ordering shall prefer Gold, then Green, then other tags, and then latest created_at_utc.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.13
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-ONE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-EXACT Exact Direct Recall Match
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-ONE
        One Direct Recall Candidate
        Current Direct Recall lookup shall return at most one candidate.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.14
        GHOST-MEM-IR-LOOKUP-FILE-ROW
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-LOOKUP-FILE-ROW
        File Metadata Attachment
        Deterministic candidates shall attach the corresponding memory_files row and paired history title and filenames.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.15
        GHOST-MEM-IR-LOOKUP-BODY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-LOOKUP-MISSING-BODY Missing Body Behavior
        GHOST-MEM-IR-LOOKUP-BODY
        .ragmem Body Attachment
        Because SQLite stores metadata only, deterministic candidates shall obtain input_text and output_text by scanning the paired .ragmem file for matching record_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.16
        GHOST-MEM-IR-LOOKUP-MISSING-BODY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-LOOKUP-BODY .ragmem Body Attachment
        GHOST-MEM-IR-LOOKUP-MISSING-BODY
        Missing Body Behavior
        When the paired filename, record_id, file, or matching block is unavailable, current body attachment shall return empty body fields rather than fabricate Q/A.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.17
        GHOST-MEM-IR-LOOKUP-JSON-LIST
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-LOOKUP-JSON-LIST
        Indexed JSON List Parsing
        Keyword and file-snapshot SQLite JSON fields shall parse to lists when valid and shall become empty lists when invalid.
        SECTION
        		12
        12. Episodic Candidate Merge and Candidate Enrichment
        TEXT
        MemoryRetriever merges deterministic Gold priority with semantic parent candidates before runtime compression.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-ENABLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-ENABLE
        Episodic Memory Enable Switch
        When episodic_memory.enabled is false, semantic parent scores shall not be converted into episodic candidates.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-CAP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-CAP
        Episodic Candidate Cap
        Semantic parent conversion and final episodic merge shall be bounded by episodic_memory.max_total_records; the current baseline is 3.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-LIVE-BODY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-LIVE-BODY
        Live Record Candidate Enrichment
        When a selected parent record is present in MemoryManager.records, candidate content shall be enriched from the live MemoryRecord full view.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-FILE-BODY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-FILE-BODY
        Indexed Record Candidate Fallback
        When a selected parent is absent from live RAM, MemoryRetriever shall attempt SQLite/.ragmem reconstruction for that record_id within the active file.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-MERGE-ORDER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-MERGE-ORDER
        Gold-First Episodic Merge
        Final episodic merging shall process deterministic Gold candidates before semantic episodic candidates.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-DEDUPE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-GOLD AC: Gold Priority and Deduplication
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-DEDUPE
        Episodic Record Deduplication
        Final episodic merging shall remove duplicate record_id values while preserving the Gold-first source order.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.7
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-SOURCE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-SOURCE
        Episodic Source Annotation
        Merged episodic candidates shall carry episodic_source equal to gold or semantic according to the selected path.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.8
        GHOST-MEM-IR-WORKING-ENRICH
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-WORKING-ENRICH
        Working Candidate Live Enrichment
        Working-memory candidates shall be overlaid with current live MemoryRecord content and episode-distance metadata when matching live records exist.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.9
        GHOST-MEM-IR-GOLD-ENRICH
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-GOLD-ENRICH
        Gold Candidate Live Enrichment
        Gold candidates shall be overlaid with current live MemoryRecord content and episode-distance metadata when matching live records exist.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.10
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-ENRICH
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-ENRICH
        Direct Recall Live Enrichment
        A Direct Recall candidate shall be overlaid with current live MemoryRecord content when the selected record belongs to the active in-memory record set.
        SECTION
        		13
        13. MemoryContextPack Contract
        TEXT
        MemoryContextPack preserves raw candidate classes, final synthesis, and diagnostics in one run-local object.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-WORKING Working Candidate List
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-EPISODIC Episodic Candidate List
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-SEMANTIC Semantic Chunk List
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-DIRECT Direct Recall Candidate
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-CONTEXT Synthesized Memory Context
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-SELECTION-DIAG Selection Diagnostics
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-TOKEN-REPORT Token Budget Report
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-COUNTS Candidate Counts
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-DICT Pack Dictionary Projection
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-DEBUG Raw Debug Markdown
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-NO-DURABLE Pack Non-Persistence
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK
        MemoryContextPack Runtime Container
        MemoryRetriever shall construct one MemoryContextPack for each non-skipped or explicit-empty memory retrieval result.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-WORKING
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK MemoryContextPack Runtime Container
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-WORKING
        Working Candidate List
        MemoryContextPack shall maintain working_memory_candidates as an ordered list.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-EPISODIC
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK MemoryContextPack Runtime Container
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-EPISODIC
        Episodic Candidate List
        MemoryContextPack shall maintain episodic_candidates as an ordered list.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-SEMANTIC
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK MemoryContextPack Runtime Container
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-SEMANTIC
        Semantic Chunk List
        MemoryContextPack shall maintain semantic_memory_chunks as an ordered list.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-DIRECT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK MemoryContextPack Runtime Container
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-DIRECT
        Direct Recall Candidate
        MemoryContextPack shall maintain zero or one direct_recall_candidate.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-CONTEXT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK MemoryContextPack Runtime Container
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-CONTEXT
        Synthesized Memory Context
        MemoryContextPack shall maintain synthesized_memory_context and memory_synthesis_diagnostics.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.7
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-SELECTION-DIAG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK MemoryContextPack Runtime Container
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-SELECTION-DIAG
        Selection Diagnostics
        MemoryContextPack shall maintain selection_diagnostics explaining query, counts, and scoring policy or explicit empty reason.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.8
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-TOKEN-REPORT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK MemoryContextPack Runtime Container
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-TOKEN-APPROX Approximate Token Report
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-TOKEN-REPORT
        Token Budget Report
        MemoryContextPack shall maintain a token_budget_report whose current raw-memory estimate is max(1, len(serialized pack) divided by 4).
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.9
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-TOKEN-APPROX
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-TOKEN-REPORT Token Budget Report
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-TOKEN-APPROX
        Approximate Token Report
        The current len(json)//4 estimate shall be identified as rough diagnostics rather than exact provider tokenization.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.10
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-COUNTS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK MemoryContextPack Runtime Container
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-PACK AC: MemoryContextPack
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-COUNTS
        Candidate Counts
        MemoryContextPack.counts shall report list lengths and binary presence of Direct Recall and synthesized context.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.11
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-DICT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK MemoryContextPack Runtime Container
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-DICT
        Pack Dictionary Projection
        MemoryContextPack.to_dict shall project all candidate groups, synthesis fields, diagnostics, token report, and counts.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.12
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-DEBUG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK MemoryContextPack Runtime Container
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-DEBUG
        Raw Debug Markdown
        MemoryContextPack may render raw candidates and diagnostics as developer debug Markdown, explicitly labeled as not final prompt context.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.13
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-NO-DURABLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK MemoryContextPack Runtime Container
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-NO-DURABLE
        Pack Non-Persistence
        MemoryContextPack shall remain run-local and shall not be written into durable MemoryRecord files or SQLite truth.
        SECTION
        		14
        14. SuperPrompt Write-Back and Controller Integration
        TEXT
        The current controller calls document retrieval first and then the memory path; memory artifacts remain separate from document artifacts.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONTROLLER-CONFIG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONTROLLER-CONFIG
        MemoryRetriever Configuration
        AppController.configure_memory_retrieval shall construct MemoryRetriever after MemoryManager and MemoryVectorStore exist and shall pass the controller memory SQLite path and runtime configuration.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONTROLLER-ORDER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONTROLLER-ORDER
        Current Retrieval Call Order
        AppController.run_retrieval shall run document Retriever first and then call MemoryRetriever when configured.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONTROLLER-FAILURE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONTROLLER-FAILURE
        Controller Memory Retrieval Failure Isolation
        An exception from MemoryRetriever during AppController.run_retrieval shall be logged and shall not erase the already produced document retrieval result.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONTROLLER-NOT-CONFIGURED
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONTROLLER-NOT-CONFIGURED
        Unconfigured MemoryRetriever
        When MemoryRetriever is not configured, the controller shall skip memory retrieval and return the SuperPrompt after document retrieval.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SP-PACK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SP-PACK
        SuperPrompt Memory Pack
        MemoryRetriever shall assign the MemoryContextPack object to SuperPrompt.memory_context_pack.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SP-CONTEXT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SP-CONTEXT
        SuperPrompt Memory Context
        MemoryRetriever shall assign synthesized_memory_context to SuperPrompt.memory_context_text.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.7
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SP-BRIEF
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SP-BRIEF
        SuperPrompt Active Memory Brief
        MemoryRetriever shall assign the latest eligible ActiveBrief title and body to SuperPrompt.active_memory_brief_title and active_memory_brief.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.8
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SP-EXTRAS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SP-EXTRAS
        SuperPrompt Memory Extras
        MemoryRetriever shall store pack dictionary, memory context text, debug Markdown, counts, and ActiveBrief title/body in SuperPrompt.extras under current memory keys.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.9
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SP-NO-DOCUMENT-OVERWRITE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-SEPARATE AC: Document Artifact Separation
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SP-NO-DOCUMENT-OVERWRITE
        Document Artifact Preservation
        Memory write-back shall not overwrite base_context_chunks, document retrieval/reranking/A3/A4 views, final_selection_ids, or S_CTX_MD.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.10
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SP-NO-STAGE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SP-NO-STAGE
        Current Stage Ownership
        Current MemoryRetriever write-back shall not independently replace the SuperPrompt document-stage lifecycle label or document stage history.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.11
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EMPTY-PACK-WRITE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-EMPTY-PACK-WRITE
        Empty Pack Write-Back
        For missing file_id or empty query, MemoryRetriever shall write an empty pack and latest eligible ActiveBrief snapshot into SuperPrompt.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.12
        GHOST-MEM-IR-NORMAL-PREVIEW
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-NORMAL-PREVIEW
        Normal Preview Uses Synthesized Context
        The normal SuperPrompt projector shall render memory_context_text and shall not render raw memory candidate debug Markdown by default.
        SECTION
        		15
        15. Configuration Governance and Current Consumption
        TEXT
        The memory_retrieval JSON section defines multiple policies, but only fields read by the current implementation shall be treated as effective.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-ROOT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-PARENT-WEIGHTS Consumed Parent Score Weights
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-WORKING Consumed Working Settings
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-EPISODIC Consumed Episodic Settings
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-DIRECT Consumed Direct Recall Settings
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-SEMANTIC Consumed Semantic Chunk Settings
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-TOKEN-LIMITS-NOT-ENFORCED Current Retrieval Token Fields Not Enforced Here
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-GOLD-BOOLEAN Gold Bypass Configuration Truth
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-TAG-CATALOG Tag Catalog Configuration Truth
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-MIGRATION Operational Parameter Migration
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-CONFIG AC: Configuration Consumption Truth
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-ROOT
        Memory Retrieval Configuration
        Memory retrieval settings shall be loaded from the versioned runtime_config.json memory_retrieval section.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-PARENT-WEIGHTS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-ROOT Memory Retrieval Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-PARENT-WEIGHTS
        Consumed Parent Score Weights
        Current MemoryScorer shall consume parent_score_weights for QA, Q, and A modes.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-WORKING
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-ROOT Memory Retrieval Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-WORKING
        Consumed Working Settings
        Current working-memory lookup shall consume enabled, max_pairs, and exclude_tags.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-EPISODIC
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-ROOT Memory Retrieval Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-EPISODIC
        Consumed Episodic Settings
        Current episodic processing shall consume enabled, max_total_records, max_gold_records, Green semantic/recency weights, Green half-life, recency_enabled, and exclude_tags.
        REQUIREMENT
