        		15.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-DIRECT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-ROOT Memory Retrieval Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-DIRECT
        Consumed Direct Recall Settings
        Current Direct Recall shall consume enabled and exclude_tags; its current interface inherently returns at most one key match.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-SEMANTIC
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-ROOT Memory Retrieval Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-SEMANTIC
        Consumed Semantic Chunk Settings
        Current semantic processing shall consume enabled, max_memory_chunks, semantic/recency weights, half-life, recency_enabled, and exclude_tags.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.7
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-TOKEN-LIMITS-NOT-ENFORCED
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-ROOT Memory Retrieval Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-TOKEN-LIMITS-NOT-ENFORCED
        Current Retrieval Token Fields Not Enforced Here
        The current retrieval path shall not claim enforcement of working-memory, Gold, Green, or Direct Recall max-token fields merely because they exist in runtime_config.json.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.8
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-GOLD-BOOLEAN
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-ROOT Memory Retrieval Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-GOLD-BOOLEAN
        Gold Bypass Configuration Truth
        Current Gold recency bypass is implemented by scoring logic; the separate gold_bypass_recency JSON fields shall not be claimed as dynamically controlling that behavior unless the implementation reads them.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.9
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-TAG-CATALOG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-ROOT Memory Retrieval Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-TAG-CATALOG
        Tag Catalog Configuration Truth
        MemoryManager currently defines its tag catalog in Python; runtime_config.memory_retrieval.tag_catalog shall not be claimed as the active catalog source until it is consumed.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.10
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-MIGRATION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-ROOT Memory Retrieval Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-MIGRATION
        Operational Parameter Migration
        Chunking values, raw-hit expansion, collection/model startup values, and remaining retrieval limits shall migrate to validated versioned JSON before being reported as centrally configured.
        SECTION
        		16
        16. Error Handling, Security, and Quality Boundaries
        TEXT
        Memory retrieval must fail or empty safely without fabricating context or weakening history scope.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-NO-FABRICATED-HIT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-NO-FABRICATED-HIT
        No Fabricated Vector Hit
        Missing vector collection, embedder, SQLite row, .ragmem body, or live record shall produce missing/empty candidate data rather than invented content.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RETRIEVAL-FAIL-TRUTH
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-RETRIEVAL-FAIL-TRUTH
        Retrieval Failure and Durable Truth
        A memory retrieval failure shall not modify .ragmem, .ragmeta.json, SQLite record truth, or stored memory vectors.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-FAIL-TRUTH
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-ASYNC-FAIL AC: Ingestion Failure Isolation
        GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-FAIL-TRUTH
        Ingestion Failure and Durable Truth
        A memory ingestion failure shall leave the durable MemoryRecord body and current metadata intact.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-NO-CROSS-HISTORY-AUTO
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-NO-CROSS-HISTORY-AUTO
        No Unapproved Automatic Cross-History Retrieval
        Automatic working, Gold, semantic parent, and semantic chunk retrieval shall remain active-history scoped; only exact Direct Recall may cross histories in the current design.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-NO-SECRET
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-NO-SECRET
        No Secret Vector Metadata
        Memory vector documents and metadata shall not intentionally include provider API keys or browser credentials.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PUBLIC-LOG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-PUBLIC-LOG
        Public Retrieval Logging
        Public logs shall report compact counts and statuses and shall not expose complete memory bodies, query embeddings, or vector values by default.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.7
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIDENTIAL-LOG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIDENTIAL-LOG
        Confidential Retrieval Diagnostics
        Complete raw hits, candidates, scoring snapshots, and pack payloads shall remain behind explicitly enabled confidential developer logging.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.8
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SCORE-REPRODUCIBILITY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SCORE-REPRODUCIBILITY
        Scoring Reproducibility
        Diagnostics shall preserve effective scoring policy, candidate counts, query text, and active file identity sufficiently to reproduce selection decisions without exposing credentials.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.9
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DETERMINISTIC-TESTS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-DETERMINISTIC-TESTS
        Deterministic Retrieval Testability
        Vector ID generation, chunk splitting, metadata sanitation, distance conversion, role aggregation, recency decay, tag filtering, deterministic lookups, candidate merge, and pack projection shall be independently testable.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.10
        GHOST-MEM-IR-NO-DOC-A3
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-NO-DOC-A3
        No Memory-to-Document A3 Claim
        Memory semantic chunks shall not be marked with document A3ChunkStatus or inserted into document A3/A4 stage views in the current implementation.
        SECTION
        		17
        17. Traceability and Acceptance Criteria
        TEXT
        These criteria verify derivative memory ingestion, retrieval, candidate selection, and SuperPrompt handoff.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.1
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CODE-OWNERSHIP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-SYNC AC: Requirement-Code Synchronization
        GHOST-MEM-IR-CODE-OWNERSHIP
        Ingestion and Retrieval Code Ownership
        MemoryChunker, MemoryIngestionManager, MemoryVectorStore, MemoryRetriever, MemoryIndexLookup, MemoryScorer, and MemoryContextPack shall map to the deepest applicable UIDs in this document.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.2
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SIBLING-BOUNDARY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROOT Memory Ingestion and Retrieval Scope
        GHOST-MEM-IR-SIBLING-BOUNDARY
        Sibling Ownership Boundary
        Durable recording/files shall remain owned by 51; ActiveBrief algorithms, runtime compression, and synthesis shall remain owned by 53.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.3
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-ENTRIES
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ENTRY-ROLES Vector Entry Roles
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-ENTRIES
        AC: Vector Entry Roles
        Given one non-empty MemoryRecord, ingestion shall create one non-empty record handle and the expected ordered non-empty question and answer entries with stable traceable IDs.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.4
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-IDEMPOTENT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-IDEMPOTENT-REPRESENTATION Record-Level Re-Ingestion Idempotency
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-IDEMPOTENT
        AC: Record Re-Ingestion
        Re-ingesting the same record_id shall replace prior vectors and shall not increase the number of duplicate IDs for that record.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.5
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-ASYNC-FAIL
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-INGEST-FAIL-TRUTH Ingestion Failure and Durable Truth
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-ASYNC-FAIL
        AC: Ingestion Failure Isolation
        If vector embedding or replacement fails, the corresponding .ragmem block and metadata shall remain available as durable truth.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.6
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-WORKING
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-WORKING-LATEST Working Memory Ordering and Limit
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-WORKING
        AC: Working Memory
        Given an active history with more records than max_pairs, working lookup shall return only the latest configured non-excluded records from that history.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.7
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-DIRECT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-DIRECT-PRIORITY Direct Recall Result Priority
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-DIRECT
        AC: Exact Direct Recall
        Given the same Direct Recall Key in multiple histories, lookup shall return at most one non-excluded result using tag priority and recency ordering.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.8
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-PARENT-SCORE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-ROLE-MAX Current Per-Role Aggregation
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-PARENT-SCORE
        AC: Parent Role Scoring
        Given multiple hits for one parent and role, the current parent role score shall equal the maximum role hit and final semantic score shall apply the configured QA/Q/A weights.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.9
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-RECENCY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-RECENCY-HALF-LIFE Episode-Distance Half-Life
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-RECENCY
        AC: Episode Recency
        For Green records at k zero and k equal to half-life, recency scores shall be 1.0 and 0.5 before semantic/recency weighted combination.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.10
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-GOLD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-EPISODIC-DEDUPE Episodic Record Deduplication
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-GOLD
        AC: Gold Priority and Deduplication
        A Gold record also selected semantically shall appear once in final episodic candidates and shall retain Gold-first source priority.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.11
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-SEMANTIC
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-SEMANTIC-ROLES Semantic Chunk Evidence Roles
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-SEMANTIC
        AC: Semantic Chunk Roles
        Final semantic memory chunks shall contain question/answer evidence only and shall exclude record_handle entries.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.12
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-SCOPE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-FILTER-FAILURE Filtered Query Failure Integrity
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-SCOPE
        AC: Automatic History Scope
        Automatic semantic and deterministic retrieval shall not return a record from another history solely because the active-file filter failed.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.13
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-PACK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-PACK-COUNTS Candidate Counts
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-PACK
        AC: MemoryContextPack
        After one successful memory retrieval, the SuperPrompt shall contain a MemoryContextPack whose candidate counts match its actual lists and optional Direct Recall/context fields.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.14
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-SEPARATE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-SP-NO-DOCUMENT-OVERWRITE Document Artifact Preservation
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-SEPARATE
        AC: Document Artifact Separation
        Running memory retrieval shall leave document chunk objects, stage views, and S_CTX_MD unchanged.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.15
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-PERMISSION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-MEMORY-PERMISSION PreProcessing Memory Permission
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-PERMISSION
        AC: Memory Context Permission
        When PreProcessing sets allow_memory_context false, the final SuperPrompt shall not receive synthesized memory context for that request.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.16
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-CONFIG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CONFIG-ROOT Memory Retrieval Configuration
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-CONFIG
        AC: Configuration Consumption Truth
        Changing an unconsumed JSON field shall not be represented as changing runtime behavior; changing a consumed field shall be observable in selection or diagnostics.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.17
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-SYNC
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-IR-CODE-OWNERSHIP Ingestion and Retrieval Code Ownership
        GHOST-MEM-IR-AC-SYNC
        AC: Requirement-Code Synchronization
        A memory ingestion/retrieval baseline shall not be accepted when vector identity, history scope, scoring equations, tag policy, candidate roles, pack semantics, or configuration authority contradicts this document.
        Built with StrictDoc 0.25.0
